business_description.nature_of_business: Boutique hotel ownership and management with integrated restaurant and event operations across Central and South Texas

positives: 16 years in business with 16 years under current management
Written contracts with subcontractors and contractor indemnification required
No commercial occupancy within the building
Fire alarms are hard-wired with central station monitoring
concerns: Swimming pools, exercise rooms, or other amenities are present
HVAC replaced in 2022, but plumbing and electrical are original from 2005
EV charging stations are installed on the premises
Risk management section indicates the building is not fully sprinklered per NFPA 13 or 13R
Cyber liability protections are not in place
Prior insurance history reflects multiple claims and a 2022 cancellation
risk_highlights.loss_history_summary: Claims counts by year were 11 in 2024, 3 in 2023, and 6 in 2022. The 2022 Zurich Insurance Group policy shows a cancellation.

extracted_text_sections.operations_description: Nature of business: Boutique hotel ownership and management with integrated restaurant and event operations across Central and South Texas. Years in business: 16. Years with current management: 16. Employees: 285 full-time and 165 part-time. Annual revenue / gross receipts: 42000000. Hours of operation: Mon-Fri 8:00 AM - 5:00 PM.
extracted_text_sections.safety_programs: Formal safety program: Yes. Written contracts with all subcontractors: Yes. Written contracts with indemnification required from all contractors: Yes. 24-hour doorman or security on premises: Yes. Fire alarms hard-wired with central station monitoring: Yes.
extracted_text_sections.claims_narrative: Prior insurance history: 2024 Travelers Companies premium 686236.25, 11 claims, cancellation No; 2023 Markel Corporation premium 619820.26, 3 claims, cancellation No; 2022 Zurich Insurance Group premium 607294.45, 6 claims, cancellation Yes.
